title: quercus dumosa var. linearis
intro: Quercus dumosa var. linearis, also known as the Himalayan scrub oak or linear-leaved scrub oak, is a variety of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Fagaceae family. It is a rich source of medicinal properties, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Quercus dumosa var. linearis include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
